recommendations.title: Dreamland
recommendations.overview: Amid the dust storms and economic depression of Dust Bowl Era Oklahoma, Eugene Evans finds his family farm on the brink of foreclosure. Discovering fugitive bank robber Allison Wells hiding in his small town, he is torn between claiming the bounty on

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: The Haunting in Connecticut 2: Ghosts of Georgia
recommendations.overview: A young family moves into a historic home in Georgia, only to learn they are not the house's only inhabitants. Soon they find themselves in the presence of a secret rising from underground and threatening to bring down anyone in its path.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: The Open House
recommendations.overview: A teenager and his mother find themselves besieged by threatening forces when they move into a new house.

recommendations.title: Two Witches
recommendations.overview: A matriarchal witch passes on her sinister inheritance to her grand-daughter, triggering the most horrific curses.

recommendations.title: Poison Ivy: The New Seduction
recommendations.overview: A sinister seductress vows to destroy a suburban family.

recommendations.title: Dark Cloud
recommendations.overview: Following the aftermath of a horrific accident, a woman is voluntarily subjected to artificial intelligence for rehabilitation.

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.

recommendations.title: Suspiria
recommendations.overview: An American newcomer to a prestigious German ballet academy comes to realize that the school is a front for something sinister amid a series of grisly murders.
